title: dactylorhiza urvilleana subsp. bithynica
intro: Dactylorhiza urvilleana subsp. bithynica, also known as the Bithynian marsh orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the region of Bithynia in Turkey. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The Bithynian marsh orchid is believed to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory diseases. Dactylorhiza urvilleana subsp. bithynica is traditionally prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
